examples: I want to be gone from here as soon as we can saddle up.
Why don't we saddle a couple of horses and go for a ride?
It had a saddle with springs sticking out, which wore away the seat of my trousers.
So get on the bus, catch a train, rent a car or saddle up your bike.
After almost a week in the saddle, the bath came not a moment too soon.
